title: V1Event
description: Hatchet V1Event entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

id.description: the id of this resource, in UUID format

createdAt.description: the time that this resource was created

updatedAt.description: the time that this resource was last updated

tenant.description: The tenant associated with this event.

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant associated with this event.

workflowRunSummary.description: The workflow run summary for this event.

payload.description: The payload of the event, which can be any JSON-serializable object.

scope.description: The scope of the event, which can be used to filter or categorize events.

seenAt.description: The timestamp when the event was seen.

triggeredRuns.description: The external IDs of the runs that were triggered by this event.

workflowRunId.description: The external ID of the triggered run.

filterId.description: The ID of the filter that triggered the run, if applicable.

triggeringWebhookName.description: The name of the webhook that triggered this event, if applicable.
